title: Kaboom Crew — MVP 1 polish (audio + particles + score + title screen)
summary: Polish pass on the MVP-0 gameplay v0 so the game feels finished: a small engine audio primitive + sound effects on the four core events (bomb-place, explosion, pickup, death), a particle burst on each blast cell, a persistent round counter + win/loss tally in the HUD, a title-screen overlay before the first round, and a difficulty dial (easy / normal / hard) that maps to bot aggression + decision cadence.
doneCriteria: Audio primitive ships under engine/runtime/audio and Kaboom Crew binds 4 events (bomb-place / blast / pickup / death) to clips
Blast cells emit a particle burst (reuse the engine particle preset)
HUD shows persistent round number + player-vs-bot W/L tally that survives the auto-restart
Title screen overlay precedes the first round; Enter / Space starts; default round count is configurable via query param
Difficulty preset reachable from ?difficulty=easy|normal|hard, applied at round start
